core_mechanism: engineered dissipation that drives an open (driven-dissipative) dynamical system toward a designed stationary state, so the target ordered configuration is realized as the fixed-point/steady-state attractor of the dissipative evolution rather than as an energy minimum
brief_reason: The abstract prepares the ordered state as a 'stationary state' of a 'driven-dissipative protocol' whose 'key ingredient' is engineered 'local dissipation,' i.e. relaxation of an open system to an engineered steady-state fixed point, with the collective-coupling regime instead producing a transient burst.
